scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @retiregolden/engine && npm run lint -w retiregolden-web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @retiregolden/engine && npm run test -w retiregolden-web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @retiregolden/engine && npm run test:coverage -w retiregolden-web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @retiregolden/engine && npm run build -w retiregolden-web
